items.text: Szafranski 59 Executive Vice President 2020 Mark A.
items.rationale: This is simply an executive officer name, title, and age listing, not a risk statement at all.

items.text: It divested one business in the first quarter of 2023 as it continues portfolio refinements to maintain portfolio discipline.
items.rationale: This sentence is a factual business update about a divestiture and portfolio refinement, not a statement identifying or expanding a specific risk to the business.
